## New Skill: [skill-name]

**Description:** Brief description of what this skill does.

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill lives in `skills/<skill-name>/`
- [ ] `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` is valid JSON
- [ ] `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` is valid JSON
- [ ] `skills/*/SKILL.md` exists with frontmatter (name, description)
- [ ] No hardcoded user paths (uses `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` where needed)
- [ ] Tested locally in Claude Code session
- [ ] Added to root `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` plugins array
- [ ] Added to `README.md` skills table
